signature.verification_note: package records detached signature metadata; trust verification is a marketplace policy gate

manifest.name: Forge CRM
manifest.description: Workflow-first enterprise CRM reference product proving Forge as a factory/framework for agentic workflow systems.

permissions.description: Create, update and resume CRM workflows through Forge.
Ingest CRM messages from approved omnichannel adapters into Forge event inbox.
Generate proposals, contracts, emails, campaigns, reports and presentations as Forge artifacts.
Run bounded CRM copilots for lead classification, risk analysis and next-best-action recommendations.
Inspect CRM audit, lineage, costs, events, logs, metrics and workflow state through Forge observability.

capabilities.title: CRM workflow system factory
capabilities.description: Create CRM systems as Forge-native workflow applications rather than separate SaaS silos.
constraints: CRM automation must be routed through Forge runtime contracts
Core limitations must become forge-core backlog before parallel CRM shortcuts
risks: Domain implementation may mask Core gaps if not explicitly reported
External channel integrations require approval-gated adapters

capabilities.title: CRM relationship management
capabilities.description: Leads, contacts, companies, opportunities, pipeline Kanban, multiple funnels, history and unified timeline.

capabilities.title: CRM commercial operations
capabilities.description: Proposals, contracts, signatures, follow-ups, forecast, goals, commissions, account management and customer success.

capabilities.title: CRM omnichannel support
capabilities.description: Tickets, SLA, chat, WhatsApp, Telegram, email and central omnichannel queues.

capabilities.title: CRM marketing automation
capabilities.description: Campaigns, segmentation, automations, landing pages, forms and lead nurturing as workflows.

capabilities.title: CRM internal operations
capabilities.description: Projects, tasks, approvals, documents, internal collaboration, internal flows and team handoffs.

capabilities.title: CRM user experience and design system
capabilities.description: Forge-owned TUI, web interface, workflow visualization, knowledge relationship, document management and design-token system.

capabilities.title: CRM AI and automation
capabilities.description: Lead classification, opportunity prioritization, proposal/document generation, executive summaries, risk analysis, Forge memory context search and next-step recommendations.

capabilities.title: CRM operational observability
capabilities.description: Audit, lineage, costs, events, logs, metrics and state inspection as Forge-owned CRM workflow artifacts.

workflows.description: Create a CRM system blueprint and implementation plan using Forge as the workflow application factory.
Prepare Forge permission authorization commands and install-readiness evidence before CRM tenant operation.
Manage leads, contacts, companies and opportunities as audited workflow-backed entities.
Enrich contact and company profiles with source lineage, relationship signals and Forge approval gates.
Render opportunity stages and movement as Forge workflow state transitions.
Orchestrate lead, opportunity, proposal, contract and follow-up evidence as a Forge-owned sales cycle.
Generate, approve and attach sales proposals as Forge artifacts.
Draft, review, approve, sign and renew contracts with lineage.
Schedule follow-ups through Forge wait states and triggers.
Generate forecast, targets and commission evidence from workflow events.
Settle goal attainment and commission statements from Forge revenue events, contract lineage and approval gates.
Review account health, renewals, expansion and success-plan tasks through Forge workflow state.
Plan customer success adoption, renewal risk, expansion playbooks and success milestones through Forge workflow state.
Run ticket and SLA workflows with ownership, waiting states and escalation.
Normalize approved chat, WhatsApp, Telegram and email adapter events before ticket creation.
Unify channel threads, identities and support queue state through Forge-owned omnichannel center artifacts.
Route chat, WhatsApp, Telegram and email events into CRM workflows.
Compose chat, WhatsApp, Telegram and email replies as approval-gated Forge artifacts before external delivery.
Plan, approve, run and report campaigns as workflow artifacts.
Define marketing segments and select approved audiences as Forge workflow artifacts.
Compose landing pages and form schemas as Forge workflow artifacts before publication or capture.
Run lead nurturing automations through Forge schedules and triggers.
Coordinate post-sale projects, tasks and team handoffs.
Record internal notes, decisions, mentions and follow-up tasks as Forge workflow artifacts.
Manage CRM document queues, approvals and audit trail.
Record files, versions and collections as Forge artifacts before document promotion.
Package approvals, SLA risks, documents, campaigns, handoffs and waiting states into Forge-owned work queues.
Publish Penpot/Open Design-inspired tokens and CRM component catalogs as Forge artifacts.
Inspect CRM audit, lineage, costs, events, logs, metrics and state from Forge-owned runtime evidence.
Generate executive summaries, KPI dashboards and business reviews from Forge CRM workflow artifacts and events.
Map enterprise CRM success criteria to user-facing deliverables backed by Forge workflows, artifacts, events and validation evidence.
Inspect approval queues, permission gates and rework decisions as Forge workflow artifacts and events.
Package a full lead-to-support customer lifecycle as Forge workflow acceptance evidence.
Bind, validate and promote CRM child workflows through Forge child_subflows and lineage artifacts.
Design CRM trigger, condition and action graphs that compile to Forge workflows, schedules and event listeners.
Trace approved CRM automation runs through Forge event dispatch, condition evidence and runtime contract receipts.
Export the CRM as a reusable Forge workflow-system blueprint with module templates, runtime contracts, portability gates and forge-core gap routing.
Audit explicit strategic CRM requirements against Forge-owned workflow, runtime, artifact, event and view evidence.
Generate a daily Forge-owned command cycle across sales, marketing, support, documents and handoffs.
Turn CRM observability bottlenecks into Forge improve experiments, benchmarks and governed promotion decisions.
Run bounded copilots for classification, prioritization and recommendations.

runtime_contracts.title: CRM system factory planner
constraints: planner output is advisory until Forge validates and promotes it
Core gaps must be reported as forge-core backlog

runtime_contracts.title: CRM installation authorization planner
constraints: installation onboarding prepares authorization evidence but does not authorize permissions automatically
human authorization must be executed through forge addons authorize-permission
CRM tenant bootstrap remains blocked until Forge permission policy records authorization

runtime_contracts.title: CRM lead classifier
constraints: classification must include evidence and confidence
recommendations do not mutate customer state without workflow approval

runtime_contracts.title: CRM relationship lifecycle packager
constraints: relationship lifecycle executor does not persist CRM state outside Forge
lead, contact, company and opportunity records are packaged as Forge artifacts and events
approval before conversion is required before CRM state mutation

runtime_contracts.title: CRM relationship timeline recorder
constraints: relationship timeline executor does not persist CRM state outside Forge
entity, relationship, pipeline and forecast changes must be promoted from Forge workflow artifacts and events
pipeline stage movement must include owner, reason and workflow lineage

runtime_contracts.title: CRM relationship profile enrichment
constraints: relationship profile enrichment does not persist CRM state outside Forge
source lineage and relationship signals must be attached before profile promotion
profile changes require Forge workflow approval before state mutation

runtime_contracts.title: CRM pipeline stage movement
constraints: pipeline stage movement does not persist CRM state outside Forge
multiple funnels and Kanban lanes must be represented as Forge artifacts
stage movement and forecast changes must be promoted as Forge workflow events

runtime_contracts.title: CRM operating copilot
constraints: operating copilot does not mutate CRM state directly
priority, risk and next-step recommendations require Forge workflow approval before state mutation
executive summaries must cite Forge workflow artifacts, events or memory context

runtime_contracts.title: CRM specialized area copilots
constraints: area copilots are specialized by CRM area and cite Forge workflow evidence
area copilot does not mutate CRM state directly
recommendations require Forge workflow approval before state mutation

runtime_contracts.title: CRM cross-domain work queue orchestrator
constraints: work queue orchestration does not mutate CRM state directly
queue assignments require Forge workflow approval before state mutation
every queue item must cite Forge artifact and event evidence

runtime_contracts.title: CRM daily operating cycle
constraints: daily operating cycle does not persist CRM state outside Forge
daily command actions require Forge workflow approval before state mutation
sales, marketing, support, documents and handoffs must cite Forge workflow artifacts or events

runtime_contracts.title: CRM design system generator
constraints: Penpot and Open Design inspiration is translated into Forge-owned artifacts, not browser-local state
design system generation does not mutate CRM state directly
components must cite Forge workflow artifacts and event-backed state sources

runtime_contracts.title: CRM governed memory promotion preparation
constraints: memory promotion preparation does not write memory directly
actual promotion must be executed by forge memory promote with approval and lineage
raw private processing memory must be summarized before organization or global sharing

runtime_contracts.title: CRM knowledge context search
constraints: knowledge context consumes Forge memory search results
CRM does not run a CRM-local vector index or write memory directly
context packs must cite memory scopes, source paths and Forge lineage

runtime_contracts.title: CRM adaptive workflow evolution
constraints: workflow evolution must be expressed as forge improve candidates, benchmark evidence and governed promotion
CRM workflow evolution does not self-modify or bypass Forge validation gates
promotion is blocked until benchmark and rollback evidence pass

runtime_contracts.title: CRM approval governance
constraints: approval governance does not persist CRM state outside Forge
every approval or rework decision must cite source workflow lineage
incomplete approvals return to source workflow tasks with explicit reason

runtime_contracts.title: CRM workflow automation designer
constraints: automation design must compile to Forge workflows schedules triggers and event listeners
designer does not execute or persist automation outside Forge
activation waits for validation evidence and permission gates

runtime_contracts.title: CRM workflow automation execution trace
constraints: automation trace must not execute automation locally
approved actions become Forge dispatch receipts for runtime contracts
failed trigger condition or activation evidence returns to rework without local execution

runtime_contracts.title: CRM enterprise customer journey acceptance
constraints: main flow must stay Forge-owned from lead capture through support and handoff
enterprise journey acceptance does not create CRM-local persistence
every required stage must have Forge artifact and event evidence before operable status

runtime_contracts.title: CRM subworkflow orchestrator
constraints: subworkflow orchestration must use Forge child_subflows and workflow lineage
orchestrator does not execute child workflows outside Forge
parent workflow promotion waits for validated child workflow gates

runtime_contracts.title: CRM observability inspector
constraints: observability inspection is derived from Forge workflow artifacts, events, costs, metrics and logs
observability inspection does not create CRM-local observability state
remediation from observations must be promoted through Forge workflow mutation or approval

runtime_contracts.title: CRM executive reporting and KPI dashboard
constraints: executive reporting is derived from Forge workflow artifacts and events
executive reporting does not create CRM-local analytics state
recommended decisions remain advisory until Forge workflow approval

runtime_contracts.title: CRM operating readiness package
constraints: readiness must map success criteria to user-facing deliverables
readiness evidence must come from Forge workflows, artifacts, events and validation gates
readiness inspection does not create CRM-local state

runtime_contracts.title: CRM workflow-system factory blueprint export
constraints: blueprint export produces a reusable workflow-system blueprint from Forge-owned CRM evidence
blueprint export does not create CRM-local state or local automation engines
Core primitive gaps must remain routed to forge-core

runtime_contracts.title: CRM strategic objective audit
constraints: strategic objective audit does not persist CRM state outside Forge
explicit strategic requirements must cite Forge workflow, runtime, artifact, event or view evidence
missing Forge Core primitives or platform gaps must be routed to forge-core

runtime_contracts.title: CRM tenant workflow bootstrap
constraints: bootstrap produces Forge-owned workflow artifacts, not a CRM-local database
worker output remains advisory until Forge attaches artifacts and validates workflow mutations

runtime_contracts.title: CRM operating snapshot
constraints: operating state is derived from Forge workflow artifacts and events
snapshot must not create a CRM-local database or parallel automation state

runtime_contracts.title: CRM proposal generator
constraints: proposal artifact must be attached to a workflow
approval is required before external delivery

runtime_contracts.title: CRM sales cycle orchestration
constraints: sales cycle executor does not persist CRM state outside Forge
lead, opportunity, proposal, contract and follow-up evidence must remain Forge workflow artifacts or events
stage progression requires Forge workflow evidence before promotion

runtime_contracts.title: CRM follow-up forecast and commission review
constraints: follow-up forecast executor does not persist CRM state outside Forge
scheduled follow-ups, forecast reviews, goals and commission accrual must be represented as Forge workflow events
commission evidence is forecast-only until the contract or revenue workflow validates it

runtime_contracts.title: CRM forecast review
constraints: forecast review executor does not persist CRM state outside Forge
pipeline snapshots, target evidence and risk flags must be attached as Forge artifacts
forecast review does not send follow-ups or external messages

runtime_contracts.title: CRM goal attainment and commission settlement
constraints: goal and commission settlement executor does not persist CRM state outside Forge
settlement is evidence-only until Forge approval records payout authorization
commission statements require revenue events and contract lineage

runtime_contracts.title: CRM account management review
constraints: account management review does not persist CRM state outside Forge
renewal and expansion states must be represented as Forge workflow events
success-plan actions must be emitted as Forge-owned task plans

runtime_contracts.title: CRM customer success plan
constraints: customer success planning does not persist CRM state outside Forge
renewal risk must be represented as Forge workflow evidence before promotion
success milestones must be emitted as Forge-owned task plans

runtime_contracts.title: CRM contract signature lifecycle
constraints: contract signature lifecycle does not persist CRM state outside Forge
signature receipt must be attached as a Forge artifact before signed state
renewal schedule must be represented as Forge workflow events

runtime_contracts.title: CRM document generator
constraints: generated artifacts must be attached to a Forge workflow
approval is required before external delivery or signature
document generator must not deliver externally or mutate CRM state directly

runtime_contracts.title: CRM document validator
constraints: failed validation returns the workflow to work with a reason

runtime_contracts.title: CRM document approval decision
constraints: approval decisions do not persist CRM state outside Forge
approved and rework states must be represented as Forge workflow events
external delivery is only unblocked after a recorded approval decision

runtime_contracts.title: CRM document library manager
constraints: document library executor does not persist CRM state outside Forge
file and version promotion require Forge artifact lineage
version promotion is blocked until approval evidence is attached

runtime_contracts.title: CRM project handoff planner
constraints: project handoff planning does not persist CRM state outside Forge
tasks must include owner, workflow lineage and blocked reason when blocked
handoff acceptance must be represented as Forge workflow events

runtime_contracts.title: CRM internal collaboration recorder
constraints: internal collaboration executor does not persist CRM state outside Forge
mentions must route to Forge task evidence before external notification
decisions must include owner lineage before workflow promotion

runtime_contracts.title: CRM campaign automation
constraints: campaign automation does not persist CRM state outside Forge
campaign scheduling and nurture steps must be represented as Forge workflow events
external sends require approved handoff or document delivery workflow

runtime_contracts.title: CRM lead nurture orchestration
constraints: lead nurture executor does not persist CRM state outside Forge
nurture wait steps and message readiness must be represented as Forge workflow events
external sends require approved consent and Forge approval artifacts

runtime_contracts.title: CRM marketing segment builder
constraints: segment builder does not persist CRM state outside Forge
approved segment artifacts must feed campaign automation
segment membership changes require Forge workflow approval before campaign automation

runtime_contracts.title: CRM landing page publishing
constraints: landing page publishing does not persist CRM state outside Forge
external publication requires Forge approval and artifact lineage
form submissions must route into Forge lead lifecycle through approved form schema artifacts

runtime_contracts.title: CRM marketing form capture
constraints: form capture does not persist CRM state outside Forge
captured submissions must route into the Forge lead lifecycle
consent must be represented as a Forge artifact before nurture events

runtime_contracts.title: CRM channel intake normalization
constraints: channel intake normalization does not persist CRM state outside Forge
approved channel adapter must be verified before ticket creation
normalized channel message artifacts must exist before ticket SLA triage

runtime_contracts.title: CRM omnichannel conversation center
constraints: omnichannel center unification does not persist CRM state outside Forge
approved channel intake must exist before conversation unification
conversation lineage must remain attached to Forge artifacts and events

runtime_contracts.title: CRM omnichannel message ingestion
constraints: omnichannel message ingestion does not persist CRM state outside Forge
channel receipt and thread artifacts must exist before SLA triage
ticket creation must be represented as Forge workflow events before SLA or handoff

runtime_contracts.title: CRM support reply composition
constraints: support reply composition does not send externally or persist CRM state outside Forge
chat, WhatsApp, Telegram and email replies require Forge approval before handoff delivery
draft response, approval record and delivery block must remain attached to Forge workflow lineage

runtime_contracts.title: CRM ticket SLA triage
constraints: ticket SLA triage does not persist CRM state outside Forge
SLA wait and escalation state must be represented as Forge workflow events
external replies still require approved omnichannel handoff

runtime_contracts.title: CRM omnichannel handoff
constraints: external message delivery requires approved integration policy

actions.label: Bootstrap CRM
actions.description: Create a CRM system blueprint through Forge workflow planning.

actions.label: Refresh CRM snapshot
actions.description: Refresh the Forge-owned CRM operating snapshot for the TUI cockpit.

actions.label: Prepare CRM authorization
actions.description: Prepare Forge permission authorization commands before CRM tenant bootstrap.

actions.label: Bootstrap CRM tenant
actions.description: Create the initial Forge-owned CRM tenant workflow pack and operating model.

actions.label: Inspect observability
actions.description: Inspect CRM audit, lineage, cost, metrics and logs through Forge workflow evidence.

actions.label: Classify lead
actions.description: Run automatic lead classification through Forge AI recommendation artifacts before pipeline routing.

actions.label: Enrich relationship profile
actions.description: Prepare contact or company enrichment artifacts and timeline evidence through Forge.

actions.label: Run relationship lifecycle
actions.description: Package lead, contact, company and opportunity lifecycle evidence through Forge before conversion.

actions.label: Record relationship event
actions.description: Append a CRM relationship or pipeline event to the Forge-owned unified timeline.

actions.label: Move pipeline stage
actions.description: Move an opportunity across a Forge-owned pipeline board and update forecast evidence.

actions.label: Run sales cycle
actions.description: Orchestrate lead, opportunity, proposal, contract and follow-up evidence through Forge.

actions.label: Review follow-up forecast
actions.description: Run commercial follow-up, forecast, goals and commission review through Forge.

actions.label: Review forecast
actions.description: Run a dedicated commercial forecast review through Forge artifacts and schedule state.

actions.label: Settle goals and commissions
actions.description: Generate goal scorecards, commission statements and compensation audit evidence through Forge.

actions.label: Manage account
actions.description: Generate account health, renewal, expansion and success-plan evidence through Forge.

actions.label: Plan customer success
actions.description: Generate adoption, renewal risk, expansion and success milestone evidence through Forge.

actions.label: Manage contract signature
actions.description: Record contract signature, renewal waits and approval-gated delivery through Forge.

actions.label: Plan project handoff
actions.description: Turn a commercial handoff into project tasks, acceptance gates and blocked-state evidence.

actions.label: Record internal collaboration
actions.description: Record internal notes, decisions, mentions and follow-up tasks as Forge-owned collaboration evidence.

actions.label: Generate executive report
actions.description: Generate executive summaries, KPI dashboards and business review evidence from Forge CRM workflow artifacts.

actions.label: Normalize channel intake
actions.description: Normalize and authorize an approved support channel event before ticket creation.

actions.label: Ingest omnichannel message
actions.description: Record an approved channel message as a Forge-owned thread before SLA triage or handoff.

actions.label: Run omnichannel center
actions.description: Unify channel threads and identities into a Forge-owned support queue snapshot.

actions.label: Compose support reply
actions.description: Draft a customer reply for chat, WhatsApp, Telegram or email as a Forge artifact before approval-gated external delivery.

actions.label: Triage ticket SLA
actions.description: Escalate or route a support ticket through Forge SLA workflow state.

actions.label: Deliver omnichannel handoff
actions.description: Deliver an approved support handoff through Forge after ticket and channel validation.

actions.label: Automate campaign
actions.description: Run approved campaign and nurture workflow automation through Forge.

actions.label: Run lead nurture
actions.description: Advance a lead nurture wait step through Forge artifacts, recommendation and approval gates.

actions.label: Build segment
actions.description: Define a CRM marketing segment and select an approval-gated audience through Forge.

actions.label: Publish landing page
actions.description: Compose a landing page and form schema as Forge artifacts before approval-gated publication.

actions.label: Capture form submission
actions.description: Convert an approved landing-page form submission into Forge lead lifecycle and consent artifacts.

actions.label: Generate proposal
actions.description: Generate an approval-gated CRM proposal and document artifact from opportunity evidence.

actions.label: Generate document
actions.description: Generate a CRM proposal, contract, report, email, campaign, landing page or presentation artifact through Forge.

actions.label: Validate document
actions.description: Validate document lineage and approval policy before promotion or delivery.

actions.label: Record document approval
actions.description: Record document approval decisions and delivery handoff evidence through Forge.

actions.label: Manage document library
actions.description: Record CRM file versions, collections and promotion approval state through Forge.

actions.label: Run operating copilot
actions.description: Generate bounded CRM recommendations, risk analysis and next actions through Forge.

actions.label: Run area copilots
actions.description: Generate specialized CRM recommendations by area through Forge evidence.

actions.label: Prepare memory promotion
actions.description: Prepare governed CRM knowledge promotion requests for Forge memory scopes.

actions.label: Search knowledge context
actions.description: Package Forge memory search results into CRM workflow context without a CRM-local vector index.

actions.label: Run work queue
actions.description: Package CRM approvals, SLA risks, documents, campaigns, handoffs and waiting states through Forge.

actions.label: Run daily cycle
actions.description: Generate the daily CRM command brief and risk register through Forge-owned workflow evidence.

actions.label: Govern approval queue
actions.description: Inspect approval artifacts, permission gates and rework decisions through Forge workflow governance.

actions.label: Generate design system
actions.description: Publish CRM design tokens and component catalog as Forge artifacts.

actions.label: Generate readiness package
actions.description: Produce the CRM operating readiness package from Forge workflow evidence.

actions.label: Export factory blueprint
actions.description: Export the CRM as a reusable Forge workflow-system blueprint with module, contract and Core gap evidence.

actions.label: Generate strategic audit
actions.description: Audit explicit CRM strategic requirements against Forge workflow, runtime, artifact, event and view evidence.

actions.label: Evolve CRM workflow
actions.description: Generate a Forge improve experiment, benchmark plan and promotion decision for a CRM workflow bottleneck.

actions.label: Run enterprise journey
actions.description: Package lead-to-support CRM operating evidence as a Forge-owned customer journey acceptance record.

actions.label: Orchestrate subworkflows
actions.description: Bind and validate CRM child workflows before parent journey promotion.

actions.label: Design workflow automation
actions.description: Compose CRM trigger, condition and action graphs before Forge activation.

actions.label: Trace workflow automation
actions.description: Trace approved CRM automation events into Forge runtime dispatch receipts.

actions.label: Refresh Ops snapshot
actions.description: Reload the Forge operational snapshot for the CRM Addon projection.

actions.label: Inspect CRM observability
actions.description: Generate CRM observability evidence through the Forge Addon executor contract.

actions.label: Run CRM operating copilot
actions.description: Generate bounded CRM recommendations from Forge workflow evidence.

actions.label: Generate readiness package
actions.description: Produce the CRM operating readiness package from Forge workflow evidence.

actions.label: Govern approval queue
actions.description: Inspect approval artifacts, permission gates and rework decisions through Forge workflow governance.

actions.label: Run enterprise journey
actions.description: Package lead-to-support CRM operating evidence as a Forge-owned journey acceptance record.

props.runtime_boundary: CRM state is rendered from Forge workflow artifacts, events, memory governance and Addon runtime contracts.

event_triggers.title: CRM follow-up due
conditions: follow-up or forecast review is due

event_triggers.title: CRM campaign launch due
conditions: campaign launch or reporting checkpoint is due

event_triggers.title: CRM lead nurture step due
conditions: nurture workflow wait step is due

event_triggers.title: CRM project handoff review due
conditions: project handoff unblock review is due

metadata.principle: Forge is a factory/framework for agentic workflow systems
